name: comment-doc-lens
description: Show definition comments and symbol documentation inline at reference sites.

commands.title: Comment Doc Lens: Show Language Status

commentDocLens.enabled.description: Enable Comment Doc Lens inlay hints.

commentDocLens.languages.description: Registered adapter language identifiers where Comment Doc Lens runs. This setting filters supported adapter languages; unknown language identifiers are ignored.

enabled.description: Enable or disable Comment Doc Lens for this language.

commentDocLens.languageOverrides.description: Per-language Comment Doc Lens settings keyed by VS Code language identifier. For example: { "python": { "enabled": false } }.

commentDocLens.maxLineLength.description: Maximum source line length scanned for candidate symbols. Longer lines are skipped to avoid expensive lookups in generated or minified files.

commentDocLens.maxHintLength.description: Maximum length of the inline comment summary.

commentDocLens.maxHintsPerRequest.description: Maximum number of hints produced per inlay hint request.

commentDocLens.minIdentifierLength.description: Minimum identifier length before hints are shown unless documentation includes a definition location.

commentDocLens.minimumDocumentationWords.description: Minimum number of words required in a documentation summary before it can be shown.

commentDocLens.preferPropertyTail.description: Prefer the final identifier in property chains, such as baz in foo.bar.baz.

commentDocLens.dedupeLineHints.description: Deduplicate repeated inlay hint summaries on the same line.

commentDocLens.resolveTimeoutMs.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for a single documentation lookup.

commentDocLens.maxCacheEntries.description: Maximum number of cached documentation lookup results.

commentDocLens.hintPrefix.description: Prefix displayed before each inline documentation summary.
